reviews.comment:
Detrás de la estación de servicio hay un espacio donde nos permitieron armar una carpa para pernoctar en un viaje en bicicleta por el norte. Baños limpios. Todo bien cuidado

(Translated by Google)
Behind the gas station, there's a space where they allowed us to pitch a tent for an overnight stay during a bike trip through the north. Clean bathrooms. Everything well-maintained.

reviews.comment:
Muy descuidada y desprolija estación YPF del ACA. Muy pobre surtido de mercadería en la tienda. Baños con poco cuidado. Muy sucio en general.

(Translated by Google)
The ACA YPF station is very neglected and untidy. The store has a very poor selection of merchandise. The restrooms are poorly maintained. It's very dirty overall.
